title: ATTICUS framework project-local baseline
content: ATTICUS framework project-local state is anchored to the global ATTICUS supercell main branch as the umbrella operating context. AMAS acts as the governance anchor in v2.0-draft form, while ATTICUS_MPO release-candidate carries the active implementation baseline with PR #99 and PR #100 merged into the current memory-engine working baseline.
context_summary: Durable ATTICUS-framework project-local baseline cell created through the checklist + starter manifest workflow.
